title: Introduction
label: What can you do?
action: Please introduce yourself and describe all your capabilities. What queries can you run? What insights can you provide?

title: Portfolio Overview
label: Current loan status
action: What's the current portfolio status? How many loans do we have by status (current, paid off, defaulted)?

title: Risk Pricing
label: Is pricing aligned with risk?
action: Compare the implied default rate vs actual default rate for each risk grade. Are any grades mispriced?

title: Concentration Risk
label: Industry exposure
action: Which industries have the highest concentration in our portfolio? Show outstanding balance and percentage of total.

title: Approval Leakage
label: False rejections
action: Are there any rejected applications where the customer profile looks better than our average approved borrower?

title: Early Warning
label: Payment patterns before default
action: For loans that defaulted, what payment patterns did they show in the 90 days before default?

title: Customer Value
label: Repeat vs first-time
action: How do repeat customers compare to first-time borrowers in terms of default rate and loan amounts?

title: High-Risk Loans
label: Top risk exposures
action: Show me the top 10 highest-risk outstanding loans based on outstanding balance and risk grade.

title: Late Payments
label: Recent delinquencies
action: Which loans have had late payments in the last 30 days? Show loan number, business name, and days late.

title: Officer Performance
label: Loan officer scorecard
action: Show me loan officer performance: applications processed, approval rates, and default rates by officer.

title: Monthly Trends
label: Application volume
action: What are the monthly application volume trends over the past 12 months?

title: Recovery Rates
label: Default recoveries
action: What are the recovery rates on defaulted loans by risk grade? How much was recovered vs lost?
